args.sql:
SELECT
    kommunenummer AS kommunenummer,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE
    LOWER(kommunenavn) = LOWER('Drammen');

args.sql:
SELECT
    teig.matrikkelenhetid AS parcel_id,
    ST_Area(teig.omrade::geography) AS area_m2,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(teig.omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE
    teig.kommunenummer = '3301'
    AND ST_Area(teig.omrade::geography) > 5000;

1.description: Fetch Drammen municipality kommunenummer and geometry

2.description: Fetch parcels in Drammen larger than 5000 m², prefiltered by kommunenummer and municipality geometry

3.description: Fetch 200-year flood zones intersecting Drammen municipality

args.sql:
SELECT
    teig.teig_id,
    teig.teignavn,
    teig.areal,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(teig.geom, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    matrikkeleneiendomskartteig.teig teig
WHERE
    teig.kommunenummer = '0602'
    AND teig.areal > 5000
    AND ST_Intersects(
        teig.geom,
        ST_Transform(
            ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('{"type":"Polygon","coordinates":[[[10.0,59.0],[11.0,59.0],[11.0,60.0],[10.0,60.0],[10.0,59.0]]]}'),
            25833
        )
    );

    teig.areal,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(teig.geom, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    matrikkeleneiendomskartteig.teig teig
WHERE
    teig.kommunenummer = '0602'
    AND teig.areal > 5000
    AND ST_Intersects(
        teig.geom,
        ST_Transform(
            ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('{"type":"Polygon","coordinates":[[[10.0,59.0],[11.0,59.0],[11.0,60.0],[10.0,60.0],[10.0,59.0]]]}'),
            25833
        )
    );
